chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc. A. No.S-76 of 2018. Imran.........Applicant. Versus. IInd Additional Sessions Judge Shaheed Benazirabad and others.....Respondents. Mr. Ashok Kumar D. Lohano, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, DPG. Date of hearing and order: 20.06.2018. ORDER IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.- The applicant by way of instant criminal miscellaneous application under section 561-A Cr.P.C. has impugned an order dated 19.01.2018 of the learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Shaheed Benazirabad, whereby on application under section 22-A & B Cr.P.C. she has directed SHO PS: A-Section Nawabshah to record statement of the private respondent under section 154 Cr.P.C. 2. It is contended by the learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant is being involved in false case by the private respondent due to political rivalry. By contending so he sought for setting aside the impugned order. 3. Learned DPG has supported the impugned order. 4. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. 5. If for the sake of argument, it is believed that the applicant is being involved by the private respondent in a false case on account of political rivalry then the applicant has to prove his innocence before the police by joining the investigation, if need be. No illegality is pointed out by the learned counsel for the applicant, which may justify for making interference with the impugned order. 6. The instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E S
